goals.title: 坚决不能改动 fix/libctest 分支和 refactor/moss_kernel_like 分支。
goals.objective: 坚决不能改动 fix/libctest 分支和 refactor/moss_kernel_like 分支。
goals.evidence: Pre-change audit: current branch refactor/moss_kernel_like remains at dc8180fe; fix/libctest remains at e0b92c81. Work will occur in a separate worktree/new branch only; no checkout/reset/commit on source branches.

goals.title: 该改动会导致本地评测无法正常运行，因此本次改动后不需要在本地运行测试。
goals.objective: 该改动会导致本地评测无法正常运行，因此本次改动后不需要在本地运行测试。
goals.evidence: Remote-only constraint honored: no local run-eval/build/QEMU execution was run; validation limited to static checks and dry-run because this branch targets remote judge QEMU and may not boot locally.

goals.title: 避免引入未实现、伪实现、硬编码评测结果。
goals.objective: 避免引入未实现、伪实现、硬编码评测结果。
goals.evidence: Scoped scan and review found no fake PASS/hardcoded evaluator result/unimplemented syscall/masking fallback; change is platform mapping/build config only. Inherited boot TODO parse dtb is unrelated and not a result mask.

goals.title: 当前 worktree 可能有用户未提交输出/文档变更，必须保留且不要混入本次分支实现。
goals.objective: 当前 worktree 可能有用户未提交输出/文档变更，必须保留且不要混入本次分支实现。
goals.evidence: Implemented in separate worktree /root/oskernel2026-orays-remote; original worktree dirty docs/output remain untouched and were not staged/committed. New branch status clean after commit.

goals.title: 新分支 refactor_moss_kernel_like_remote 从 refactor/moss_kernel_like 派生。
goals.objective: 新分支 refactor_moss_kernel_like_remote 从 refactor/moss_kernel_like 派生。
goals.evidence: Created branch refactor_moss_kernel_like_remote from refactor/moss_kernel_like at dc8180fe; commit 84e0a99b contains remote-specific changes.

goals.title: 找出并移植 fix/libctest 中解决远程/容器 loongarch64 QEMU 取指异常或循环的真实实现差异。
goals.objective: 找出并移植 fix/libctest 中解决远程/容器 loongarch64 QEMU 取指异常或循环的真实实现差异。
goals.evidence: Ported fix/libctest e0b92c81 remote LA/QEMU fix: high-half platform config, boot page-table L0 index from KERNEL_BASE_VADDR, AX_CONFIG_PATH rerun, local platform config selection, and local patched axplat crate.

goals.title: 不修改源分支引用，不污染用户已有未提交变更。
goals.objective: 不修改源分支引用，不污染用户已有未提交变更。
goals.evidence: Source refs unchanged: fix/libctest e0b92c81 and refactor/moss_kernel_like dc8180fe; branch work isolated in refactor_moss_kernel_like_remote. Staged-file check excluded docs/output/markdown.

goals.title: 只做静态/差异验证，不跑本地评测；如可行运行非执行型检查。
goals.objective: 只做静态/差异验证，不跑本地评测；如可行运行非执行型检查。
goals.evidence: Final remote branch gate complete: refactor_moss_kernel_like_remote commit 84e0a99b is clean, contains no docs/output/markdown files, uses static/dry-run validation only, and final cleaner/review are APPROVE/CLEAR.

codexObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-fix-libctest-refactor-moss-kernel-li 坚决不能改动 fix/libctest 分支和 refactor/moss_kernel_like 分支。; G002 该改动会导致本地评测无法正常运行，因此本次改动后不需要在本地运行测试。; G003 避免引入未实现、伪实现、硬编码评测结果。; G004-worktree 当前 worktree 可能有用户未提交输出/文档变更，必须保留且不要混入本次分支实现。; G005-refactor-moss-kernel-like-remote-ref 新分支 refactor_moss_kernel_like_remote 从 refactor/moss_kernel_like 派生。; G006-fix-libctest-loongarch64-qemu 找出并移植 fix/libctest 中解决远程/容器 loongarch64 QEMU 取指异常或循环的真实实现差异。; G007 不修改源分支引用，不污染用户已有未提交变更。; G008 只做静态/差异验证，不跑本地评测；如可行运行非执行型检查。
